chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1036 - وَ سَأَلَهُ بَزِيعٌ اَلْمُؤَذِّنُ فَقَالَ لَهُ: إِنِّي أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَقْدَحَ عَيْنِي فَقَالَ لِي «اِفْعَلْ» فَقُلْتُ إِنَّهُمْ يَزْعُمُونَ أَنَّهُ يُلْقَى عَلَى قَفَاهُ كَذَا وَ كَذَا يَوْماً لاَ يُصَلِّي قَاعِداً قَالَ «اِفْعَلْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1036 - Bazi' the Muezzin asked Imam (as):
"I intend to undergo a procedure on my eye."
Imam (as) replied: "Do it."
Bazi' then said: "But they claim that I will be made to lie on my back for several days and will not be able to perform prayer while sitting."
Imam (as) replied: "Do it."
